category_sources: source_facts.description says it tracks home projects, maintenance schedules, appliances, and quotes; official micasa docs describe home maintenance, projects, incidents, vendors, documents, and appliances.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is micasa; official homepage and docs use the lowercase product name micasa.
docs_sources: Official micasa docs page provides getting started, user guide, reference, and development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/micasa-dev/micasa; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a TUI; official docs describe a keyboard-driven terminal UI, local SQLite storage, maintenance tracking, projects, and appliances.
